items.title: Ghana drops coup leader's name from main airport on putsch anniversary
items.dek: Supporters of the move said the Kotoka name contradicted the country’s democratic values.
items.body: Supporters of the move said the Kotoka name contradicted the country’s democratic values.

items.title: Celebrity doctor Peter Attia steps down from CBS over Epstein links
items.dek: The health influencer's spokesman says he wants to avoid his association with the late sex offender becoming "a distraction".
